subcodes.first_line: In this day every falsifier maketh claim to the truth, and every profligate one doth adorn himself with the garment of piety [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز هر کاذبی دعوی صدق نموده و هر فاجری خود را به طراز زهد جلوه داده
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
